mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_progress (task_id, task_type, progress, status, message, total_items, processed_items, started_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{taskType}, #{progress}, #{status}, #{message}, #{totalItems}, #{processedItems}, #{startedAt}, datetime('now'), datetime('now'))
mapper.update: UPDATE task_progress SET progress = #{progress}, status = #{status}, message = #{message}, processed_items = #{processedItems}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE task_progress SET status = #{status}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, message = #{message}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE task_progress SET status = 'ERROR', message = '由于进程退出，任务已中断并失败', updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE status = 'RUNNING'
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, task_type, progress, status, message, total_items, processed_items, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM task_progress WHERE task_type = #{taskType} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
